20:["$","section",null,{"className":"pp-section","id":"trajectory","children":[["$","h2",null,{"children":"Yield trajectory"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"about-prose","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"ETH Aerodrome has been on a 4-day rising streak, with APY moving from 15.26% to 20.66% over this period. Over the past 30 days, the vault delivered positive yields on 30 out of 30 days. Week-over-week, yields have increased by 4.0%. The strongest 7-day period was Apr 24-Apr 30 averaging 18.23%, while the weakest was Apr 16-Apr 22 at 13.89%. On 1 ETH, that's the difference between earning ~0.01519 ETH and ~0.01157 ETH per month. Current 24h APY of 20.66% is 26.6% above the product's own 30-day average."}]}]]}]

You deposit ETH, and the vault routes capital through the Aerodrome strategy on your behalf - harvesting rewards, swapping them back to ETH, and redepositing without manual steps."}]]}],["$","details","2",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Where does the yield come from?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Yield is composed of: 11.26% from AERO. Sources can include base lending rates, protocol token rewards and liquidity incentives."}]]}],["$","details","3",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"How stable has the APY been?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"20.66% over the last 24 hours vs 16.50% over 30 days. Notable drift between the short and longer window, common in DeFi."}]]}],["$","details","4",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"How much is currently deposited?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Total value locked sits at $49K right now. TVL changes as users deposit and withdraw; we update the figure every hour from the chain."}]]}],["$","details","5",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"What are the strategy risks?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["No DeFi yield strategy is risk-free. The main vectors that apply to"," ","ETH Aerodrome"," are ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"smart-contract risk"}]," (a bug or upgrade in the vault or the underlying ","Aerodrome"," protocol could cause loss of funds), ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"oracle risk"}]," (mis-priced price feeds can drain a strategy in a single block),"," ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"liquidity risk"}]," (large withdrawals at the wrong moment can clip the share-price), ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"depeg risk"}]," (the underlying ","ETH"," de-pegging from its target value), and"," ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"governance risk"}]," (admin keys, parameter changes, fee switches). Risk levels we display on the site are editorial classifications, not a quantitative model. The full framework, including what each tier means, how we score, and the open questions we leave on the table, lives on the"," ",["$","$L8",null,{"href":"/risk-framework","children":"risk framework page"}],"."]}]]}]]}]]}]
